# map_input.txt — L-shaped building with complex boundary polygon.
# The footprint is an L-shape:
#   Bottom arm:  x=0..70, y=0..35
#   Left tower:  x=0..35, y=35..70
# The upper-right area (x=35..70, y=35..70) is outside the building.
# Height: 18 cm.
# Scenario: tests mapping with a non-rectangular boundary.
#
# Format: x,y,z,status  (status 1 = occupied)

# --- Floor — bottom arm ---
